name: notctyparser

metadata.name: notctyparser
metadata.summary: Just ctyparser with added version check.

documentation:
# notctyparser

notctyparser is a fork and extension of [ctyparser](https://github.com/miaowware/ctyparser).

I've probably screwed something up. Use the original.

A CTY.DAT parser for modern amateur radio programs.

[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/notctyparser)](https://pypi.org/project/notctyparser/) ![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/notctyparser) ![PyPI - License](https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/notctyparser)

## Installation

`notctyparser` requires Python 3.6 at minimum.

```none
pip install notctyparser
```

## Fork

I just added a stupid check for update without doing the update.

```python
def check_update(self) -> bool:
```

- Changed locale to en_US.utf8
- Used xpath to parse the download link.
- Chose more narrow raised exceptions.
- Specified utf-8 file encoding.
- Made the linter happy.

## Copyright

Copyright 2019-2022 classabbyamp, 0x5c  
Released under the MIT License.  
See `LICENSE` for the full license text.

methods.name: notctyparser.bigcty.BigCty.check_update
documentation:
Checks if an update exists.
\:raises AttributeError : If there is no date in the feed.
\:return: `True` if an update is available, otherwise `False`.
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: notctyparser.bigcty.BigCty.update
documentation:
Upates the instance's data from the feed.

```
raises AttributeError

If there is no date in the feed.

raises ResourceWarning

If unable to download bigcty.

return

True if an update was done, otherwise False.

rtype

bool
```

methods.name: notctyparser.bigcty.BigCty.__repr__
documentation: repr(): Class name, instance ID, and last_updated

Class representing a BigCTY dataset.
Can be initialised with data by passing the path to a valid `cty.json` file
to the constructor.

```
param file_path

Location of the cty.json file to load.

type file_path

str or os.PathLike, optional

var version

the datestamp of the data, YYYYMMDD format.

vartype version

str
```
